rationale: Bug in collection name parsing using regex in db.rb; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Non-ASCII string crash on insert; too vague/early-era to identify specific BSON spec rule violated.
Performance/correctness bug: bulk inserts sent individually; no cross-driver spec rule existed in 2009.
Client-side _id generation improvement; no description, pre-spec era, cannot name specific spec rule.
API improvement to return _id from save/insert; no description, pre-spec era.
RangeError for Fixnum >4 bytes in C ext BSON; implementation bug in C ext, no formal BSON spec rule named.
C extension build failure on Ruby 1.9; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
OrderedHash initialize bug causing objects not inserted; internal Ruby API bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Empty fields array returns all fields instead of _id only; pre-spec driver behavior bug with no named spec rule.
Cursor GC finalization improvement; implementation/resource management, no specific cursors spec rule violated.
Namespace refactor from XGen::Mongo::Driver to Mongo; pure internal refactor, no spec involvement.
Vague BSON C extension error on insert; insufficient detail to identify spec rule.
Replica pair master detection bug; pre-SDAM-spec era, implementation flaw in topology selection logic.
Ruby Date type not supported by BSON serializer; Ruby-specific type mapping, not a BSON spec violation.
Dotted field projection returns empty hash instead of nested doc; driver parsing bug, no spec rule involved.
C extension build failure on Snow Leopard (macOS); build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
UTF-8 string returned as ASCII-8BIT in Ruby 1.9; Ruby encoding handling issue, not a BSON spec conformance violation.
Add VERSION constant; packaging/API improvement, no spec involvement.
RuntimeError on concurrent load due to socket/BSON corruption; concurrency/threading implementation bug, no spec rule.
Add limit/skip/sort cursor helpers; API feature addition, no spec nonconformance.
Deprecate :offset in favor of :skip to 'mesh better with other drivers'; explicit alignment with other drivers.
Sort API improvement to accept [key, direction] pairs; API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
slave_ok flag not propagated to queries; pre-SDAM/server-selection spec era, internal flag propagation bug.
BSON test failure with duplicate data in serialization; test suite bug, not a driver spec nonconformance.
C extension build failure on Ruby 1.9; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Log output formatting regression after message class removal; internal logging bug, no spec involvement.
Refactor: move socket code from DB to Connection class; internal architecture refactor, no spec involvement.
Gemspec file list cleanup; packaging/build task, no spec involvement.
C extension fails for negative dates in Ruby 1.9; Ruby-version-specific C ext bug, not a named BSON spec violation.
Connection.new ignores port argument regression; connection API bug, predates formal connection-string spec.
Improper exception type raised for bad ObjectId encoding; API ergonomics bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Add keyf support to group operations; feature addition for server aggregation, no spec nonconformance.
sort() usability fix for single pair input; API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
BSON.serialize segfaults on unknown type instead of raising exception; C ext crash, not a BSON spec violation.
C tests fail on macOS due to missing symbol in C ext; build/OS compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
Safe mode for remove; pre-write-concern-spec era feature addition, no spec nonconformance identified.
Convert documentation to YARD format; docs task, no spec involvement.
Raise specific exception for Date/DateTime BSON objects; Ruby-specific API ergonomics, not a BSON spec rule violation.
NoMemoryError when serializing BigDecimal; Ruby-specific type handling crash, no BSON spec rule contradicted.
Implement MinKey/MaxKey BSON types; feature gap, but description is empty; cannot confirm specific spec rule violated.
Socket not returned to pool if Exception raised; implementation resource-management bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Overly strict BSON type checking rejects ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone; Ruby duck-typing API issue, not a BSON spec violation.
ObjectId.from_time helper; API feature addition with no description of spec noncompliance.
Db#eval fails invoking addUser; server-side JS eval issue, no spec area involved.
Log output should ignore binary data; logging quality improvement, no spec involvement.
GridFS multiple files with same name feature; API feature addition, no GridFS spec nonconformance.
Gem version naming screws up RubyGems indexing; packaging/build issue, no spec involvement.
GridStore.unlink missing :root option; API gap/improvement, not a GridFS spec nonconformance.
Connection failure recovery question/feature; pre-SDAM spec, API design discussion, no spec violation.
create_index fails for geospatial 2d index; feature addition for server capability, no index spec nonconformance.
